languages.text: "Себериан мне уже изрядно наскучил. Теперь очередь за вами: забирайте его и давайте без лишних слов".

traits.locale_text: "Себериан мне уже изрядно наскучил. Теперь очередь за вами: забирайте его и давайте без лишних слов".

languages.text: "Seberian has bored me to tears already. Now it is your turn: take him away and let's be done with it."
languages.original_text: "Себериан мне уже изрядно наскучил. Теперь очередь за вами: забирайте его и давайте без лишних слов".

traits.locale_text: "Seberian has bored me to tears already. Now it is your turn: take him away and let's be done with it."
"Seberian has bored me to tears already. Now it is your turn: take him away and let's be done with it."
"Seberian has bored me to tears already. Now it is your turn: take him away and let's be done with it."

languages.text: “我对塞贝里安已经不感兴趣了。接下来交给你了，把他带走，此事就此了结。”
languages.original_text: "Seberian has bored me to tears already. Now it is your turn: take him away and let's be done with it."

traits.locale_text: “我对塞贝里安已经不感兴趣了。接下来交给你了，把他带走，此事就此了结。”

languages.text: « Seberian m'a déjà tiré des larmes d'ennui et voilà que vous vous y mettez à votre tour... Emmenez-le, qu'on en finisse. »
languages.original_text: "Seberian has bored me to tears already. Now it is your turn: take him away and let's be done with it."

traits.locale_text: « Seberian m'a déjà tiré des larmes d'ennui et voilà que vous vous y mettez à votre tour... Emmenez-le, qu'on en finisse. »

languages.text: "Seberian'dan o kadar bıktım ki gözlerimden yaşlar damlayacak. Sen de bıkacaksın. Götür onu, bu iş bitsin artık."
languages.original_text: "Seberian has bored me to tears already. Now it is your turn: take him away and let's be done with it."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian'dan o kadar bıktım ki gözlerimden yaşlar damlayacak. Sen de bıkacaksın. Götür onu, bu iş bitsin artık."

languages.text: «Seberian ya me ha aburrido hasta el agotamiento. Es su turno: lléveselo y acabemos con esto».
languages.original_text: "Seberian has bored me to tears already. Now it is your turn: take him away and let's be done with it."

traits.locale_text: «Seberian ya me ha aburrido hasta el agotamiento. Es su turno: lléveselo y acabemos con esto».

languages.text: "Seberian hat mich bereits zu Tode gelangweilt. Jetzt seid Ihr an der Reihe: Bringt ihn weg und lasst es uns zu Ende bringen."
languages.original_text: "Seberian has bored me to tears already. Now it is your turn: take him away and let's be done with it."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian hat mich bereits zu Tode gelangweilt. Jetzt seid Ihr an der Reihe: Bringt ihn weg und lasst es uns zu Ende bringen."

languages.text: 「シベリアはもう飽き飽きだ。今度は君が連れて行って、これで終わりにしよう。」
languages.original_text: "Seberian has bored me to tears already. Now it is your turn: take him away and let's be done with it."

traits.locale_text: 「シベリアはもう飽き飽きだ。今度は君が連れて行って、これで終わりにしよう。」
